zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine於1154年5月4日出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊時，他的父親Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux30歲，母親Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine24歲。他於1184年與Yolande de Coucy結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他去世於1218年12月28日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine于1154年5月4日出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊时，他的父亲Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux30岁，母亲Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine24岁。他于1184年与Yolande de Coucy结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他去世于1218年12月28日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯布萊。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine was born on 4 May 1154, in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, was 30 and his mother, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, was 24. He married Yolande de Coucy in 1184. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1189. He died on 28 December 1218, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine est né le 4 mai 1154, à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Coucy en 1184. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1218, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Braine, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine am 4. Mai 1154 in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux 30 und seine Mutter Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine 24. Er hat 1184 Yolande de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1218 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Yolande de Coucy nel 1184. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Morì il 28 dicembre 1218, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braineが1154年5月4日にフランスピカーディエイスンブレアインで生まれた時，父Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreuxは30歳，母Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braineは24歳であった。1184年にYolande de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。彼は1218年12月28日に故郷で64歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンブレアインにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine(이)가 1154년 5월 4일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1184년 Yolande de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1218년 12월 28일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 브레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine nasceu em 4 de maio de 1154, em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Coucy em 1184. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1218, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Braine, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ro.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Franţa

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine родился 4 мая 1154 г. в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Coucy в 1184 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 декабря 1218 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности бреаин, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert II comte de Dreux de Brie et de Braine nació el 4 de mayo de 1154, en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Robert Ier dit 'le Grand' comte de Dreux, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnès de Baudement comtesse de Braine, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Yolande de Coucy en 1184. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1218, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Braine, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
